title: Wild's Breath
description: Minecraft, but it's BOTW with some features from TOTK
body:
![Modpack's Main Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3c40a8b55b3a38b6ef58d7d76fa19676ae0938.png)

I tried my best to recreate Zelda Breath of The Wild and Tears of The Kingdom.
 It includes :

- New HUD
- New animations
- New movements
- New vanilla like natural blocks
- New stuctures
- New loot system
- Displayed tool on your back
- New visuals
- New items
- New tools
- New armors
- Better third person
- Dynamic trees
- Better vanilla structures
- Waystones
- A Minimap and a World Map

>   **Before starting a World, Set You GUI scale to 5, or Your HUD will be broken.**
